title: M&T Bank Announces Harlem Small Business Innovation Lab in Partnership with Carver Federal Savings Bank
text: The six-week program is designed to help empower, develop, and uplift multicultural business owners, will culminate in pitch competition HARLEM, N.Y., Feb. 28, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- M&T Bank's Harlem Multicultural Small Business Innovation Lab, a six-week program designed to provide local entrepreneurs with guidance, education, and resources to help them start and grow businesses, is now accepting applications.

title: Loan Growth Supports M&T Bank (MTB) Despite Rising Costs
text: M&T Bank's (MTB) top line gets support from increasing loans and deposit balances from acquisitions. However, continued cost increases and deteriorating credit quality are concerning.

title: M&T Bank (MTB) Announces 8.3% Increase in Quarterly Dividend
text: M&T Bank (MTB) announces a hike of 8.3% in its quarterly cash dividend. This, along with share repurchases and strategic buyouts, will continue to enhance shareholder value.

title: M&T Bank Corporation to Participate in the RBC Capital Markets Global Financial Institutions Conference
text: BUFFALO, N.Y. , Feb. 23, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- M&T Bank Corporation (NYSE:MTB)("M&T") will participate in the RBC Capital Markets Global Financial Institutions Conference being held in New York City.

title: M&T Bank Corporation Announces Increased Common Stock Dividend
text: BUFFALO, N.Y. , Feb. 22, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- M&T Bank Corporation ("M&T") (NYSE:MTB) announced that it has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.30 per share on its common stock.

title: M&T Bank Recognized for Its Strong Relationships with Small-Business Customers
text: Latest Coalition Greenwich survey highlights bank's commitment to help small employers BUFFALO, N.Y. , Feb. 15, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- For the second consecutive year, M&T Bank (NYSE:MTB) has been recognized by Coalition Greenwich as a top brand in the financial services industry for its commitment to maintaining relationships with small-business customers.
